PowerView PS C:\> Get-NetUser | select samaccountname, description
samaccountname description
-------------- -----------
Administrator  Built-in administrator
robb.stark     King in the North
brandon.stark  Three-eyed raven

samaccountname : svc_sql
distinguishedname : CN=svc_sql,CN=Users,DC=north,DC=sevenkingdoms,DC=local
serviceprincipalname : MSSQLSvc/winterfell.north.sevenkingdoms.local:1433

name : Domain Admins
member_count : 5

name : WINTERFELL.north.sevenkingdoms.local
trustedfordelegation : True

PS C:\> Find-LocalAdminAccess
WINTERFELL.north.sevenkingdoms.local

PS C:\> Invoke-ACLScanner
ObjectDN=CN=Robb,CN=Users,DC=north,DC=local; ActiveDirectoryRights=GenericAll
